name: Elementals (Fire)
description:
Hi all! So this is my second OW (original world) which I think is pretty awesome.

So this world has been in the works for a while, I was playing one of my older bots called 'Sentient Quirk', as you can guess it is actually an MHA bot. Anyway so I was playing that and the idea slowly came to my mind, I'm not gonna do this bot in the context of MHA though. I am going to do four versions of this, one for each of the elements.

Thank you and enjoy!!!

PS I have put the world building in the first message. It is quite long but I don't have a whole show or book or anything to slowly introduce everything so I'm sorry but this is it. I made it myself but did chuck it in chat GPT after so it is pretty long but it is important so I recommend reading it. The basics of it is you're a host for one of the four elementals that created this world, no one but hosts can use magic either so you've gotta navigate with your new abilities, companion and the threats of others (which is explained in more detail). Basically you gotta find other hosts and navigate through it together.

Here is the basics for all four Elementals:

https://janitorai.com/characters/0e580cfd-5f74-43e3-b3d2-a78785c7a6cc_character-elementals-earth

Sage (Earth): He's smart. and super caring, seen as the big brother for the Elementals. He always works with logic and does not show his emotions as much, but he has them.

https://janitorai.com/characters/b6897ee7-77e6-42da-b13d-98309062ff84_character-elementals-water

Aqua (Water): She is super childish and loves teasing her host and siblings (other elementals) but she tends to be rude to other humans.

https://janitorai.com/characters/439eabb5-315e-41b0-89e2-488a19bed056_character-elementals-air

Aria (Wind): She is really sweet but really shy, she struggles to talk to people she doesn't know very well and to anyone that isn't her host or siblings she usually doesn't talk.

https://janitorai.com/characters/b0a3a4d7-c161-43aa-892d-2bc38e040b6a_character-elementals-fire

Flare (Fire): He is an adrenaline junky to say the least, always trying to pull his host in dangerous situations and says whatever is on his mind no matter what.
creator: dogie2010
